Recovery: Average

Reading: State
Average
Recovery 51 • Sleep 62 • Strain 69%

Read
Recovery is middling and the day has already taken a moderate bite, while output is still lighter than your usual rhythm. With intake running thin, especially on the muscle-protection side, this window favors quality resistance work over intensity or extra volume.

Measured strength.
